LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF TAKARA BELMONT USA INC.'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT OF GINA KHAN SALON, INC. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. MISREPRESENTATION REGARDING LICENSING NOT INCORPORATED INTO THE NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION CAUSE OF ACTION. MISREPRESENTATION CAUSE OF ACTION MUST BE SUPPORTED BY REPRESENTATIONS OF FACT, NOT EXPRESSIONS OF OPINION. SEE NEU-VISIONS SPORTS, INC., VS. SOREN/MCADAM/BARTELLS 86 CAL.APP. 4TH 303. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: LINDA FORSTER, CSR #13286

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories And To Impose A Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-21-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
1. Plaintiff Takara Belmont USA, Inc.'s Motion to compel answers to form interrogatories. Based on defendant's representation that verified responses have been served, off-calendar-moot;
2. Request for monetary sanction, denied. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice Of Demurrer To Cross-Complaint Of Gina Khan Salon, Inc.; Demurrer; Memorandum Of P/A
Off Calendar May-01-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF TAKARA BELMONT USA INC.'S Demurrer To Cross-Complaint Of Gina Khan Salon, Inc. Appearances: David B. Newdorf, Esq. of Newdorf Legal (415) 357-1234, appearing for Plaintiff. There are no other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer is sustained with ten days leave to amend. Misrepresentation regarding licensing not incorporated into the negligent misrepresentation cause of action. Misrepresentation cause of action must be supported by representations of fact, not expressions of opinion. See Neu-Visions Sports, Inc., vs. Soren/McAdam/Bartells 86 Cal.App. 4th 303. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW/VC)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Linda Forster CSR # 13286
